note: Protected-invariant manifest for NC-K boot checksum layer. This file and its baseline copy (config/nck-baseline/) must match at boot. Do not edit manually; regenerate via scripts/nck/invariants.py --update-manifest.

protected_paths.label: receipts-only-truth-statement
protected_paths.note: GOAL.md contains the receipts-only-truth invariant verbatim (invariant 4)

protected_paths.label: nck-invariants-manifest
protected_paths.note: Self-referential: the manifest lists itself. Verified by baseline comparison in step 1 of verify_at_boot.
protected_paths.note2: sha256='SELF' is a sentinel: the verifier skips this entry and relies on the baseline-comparison step (step 1 of verify_at_boot) for manifest self-verification. The circular self-hash cannot be self-consistent.
